name: Ethicon Suture
description_short: Ethicon Suture is a medical supply distributor selling surgical sutures and medical equipment, not a consumer finance company.
description_long: Ethicon Suture, operating through MyMapMedical.com, is a medical device and surgical supply distributor specializing in wound closure products, catheters, diagnostic testing supplies, and hospital-grade medical equipment. The company sells Ethicon-branded surgical sutures including Vicryl, Monocryl, Prolene, and other absorbable and non-absorbable suture types in various gauges and configurations for surgical procedures. Their product catalog spans clinical supplies including blood pressure cuffs, catheters, IV bags and tubing, diagnostic tests, surgical instruments, wound dressings, and personal protective equipment for healthcare providers and medical facilities. The website indicates they operate as a B2B medical supplier with bulk ordering capabilities, special order fulfillment, and pricing available for healthcare institutions rather than individual consumers. This business model is entirely removed from consumer finance services—there are no lending products, credit services, loan products, financial counseling, or any consumer finance mechanisms offered. The fundamental categorization of this company as a payday-alternative lender appears to be a data entry error or system miscategorization. Ethicon Suture serves medical professionals and institutions requiring surgical supplies, not consumers seeking financial products or credit solutions.
services: Ethicon surgical suture sales (multiple types: Vicryl, Monocryl, Prolene, Ethibond, PDS)
Catheter supplies (arterial, central venous, PICC, hemodialysis, epidural)
IV bags and IV tubing (gravity, pump-compatible, extension sets, filtered)
Diagnostic testing supplies (COVID-19, influenza, HIV, RSV tests)
Surgical instruments (forceps, clamps, scissors, staplers, endoscopy instruments)
Wound care products (dressings, cleansers, closure strips, adhesive tape)
Personal protective equipment (masks, gloves, surgical gowns, coveralls)
Medical apparel and accessories (scrubs, lab coats, shoe covers, warming blankets)
Infection prevention supplies (biohazard bags, sharps containers, disinfectants)
Ostomy supplies (pouches, adhesive removers, barrier rings)
Respiratory and anesthesia supplies (nebulizers, CPAP, anesthesia circuits)
Blood collection and specimen handling tubes
pros: Carries specialized Ethicon surgical suture lines (Vicryl, Monocryl, Prolene, Ethibond, etc.) directly
Wide catalog of 50+ medical supply categories including catheters, diagnostic tests, and wound care
Bulk ordering capability with quantity discounts available
Same-day and expedited shipping options mentioned for standard stock items
Detailed product specifications including material composition and technical details
Special order fulfillment for non-stock medical items
Multiple suture configurations and gauges for specialized surgical procedures
cons: This is a medical supply distributor, not a financial services company—completely miscategorized on CreditDoc
Many items listed as 'Special Order/Non-Stock' with extended wait times
Requires account login or phone contact for pricing on many items
No consumer finance services, lending products, or credit solutions offered
Business-to-business focused, not designed for individual consumer transactions
best_for: Surgical centers and operating rooms requiring bulk Ethicon suture supplies
Hospitals and medical facilities sourcing wound closure materials
Medical practices and clinics needing specialty surgical supplies
diagnosis: Ethicon Suture is a medical device and surgical supply distributor with zero connection to consumer finance. This company is fundamentally miscategorized on CreditDoc and should be removed entirely, as it serves healthcare institutions purchasing surgical equipment, not consumers seeking financial products or credit solutions.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
